improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion:
<meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access. Try three free searches, then join from US$2/day.">
<meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant">
<meta property="og:description" content="Claude-powered AI assistant for business owners, traders, and professionals. Instant answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace. Start with three free searches.">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:image" content="https://gdn.ai/og-image.jpg">
<meta property="og:url" content="https://gdn.ai/">
<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
<meta name="twitter:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant">
<meta name="twitter:description" content="Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Try three free searches, then unlock unlimited access from US$2/day.">
improvements.rationale: These tags ensure the homepage displays compelling, accurate previews in Google search results and when shared on LinkedIn, Twitter, or Facebook. The description highlights key value props (Claude-powered, instant answers, voice chat, free trial, low entry price) within the 155-160 character limit for search. OG tags create a professional social preview that builds trust and encourages clicks from the target audience of business owners and traders.

improvements.suggestion:
Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant

Meet Gideon — get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for your business operations. Try three searches free, then unlock unlimited access.
improvements.rationale: This headline immediately communicates what Gideon is (AI assistant) and who it's for (trade and business professionals). The subheading delivers the three core value props (instant answers, voice chat, professional support) while clearly stating the free trial offer, reducing friction and encouraging visitors to engage before hitting the paywall.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to choose a membership plan to continue. Plans start from just US$2 per day, billed monthly or annually—with annual billing saving you 30 percent. As a member, you'll unlock unlimited access to Gideon's AI-powered trade and business support, voice chat, and your own dedicated workspace.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in a freemium model—what happens at the paywall. By clearly explaining the transition from free to paid, stating exact pricing, and reinforcing the value unlocked by membership, it reduces uncertainty and supports conversion at the critical decision moment.
